name: Google Chat
description: Team messaging and collaboration service from Google Workspace for direct messages, spaces, and threaded conversations.

years.notes: Hangouts Chat launch icon (2017-2020): teal speech bubble with near-white '@' glyph. Bubble + '@' geometry isolated verbatim from the official Wikimedia 'Google Chat logo (2017-2020).svg' wordmark file (the launcher mark beside the 'Chat' wordmark); decorative drop-shadow/highlight overlays stripped. Native 25.333x29.333 canvas rescaled to 24x24 viewBox (scale 24/29.333) and centered horizontally. Bubble fill #00897B = Material Design Teal 600; glyph fill #F5F5F5 = Material Grey 100.

Workspace rebrand: two overlapping green message bubbles. All-green palette retained as homage to Hangouts (Chat did not adopt the four-color treatment until 2023). Source viewBox 0 0 479.4 500 fit into 24x24 via scale(0.048) and centered horizontally.

Four-color speech bubble joining the rest of the Workspace suite. Uses Google's brand palette (green, blue, yellow, red) with the green bubble outline as the primary mark. Source viewBox 0 0 311 320 fit into 24x24 via scale(0.075) and centered horizontally; non-rendering trace guideline strokes stripped.
